Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log of three cases Lets analyze the traces Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI twice VF AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Notice that after AE sometimes we have RMI which may be repeated followed by VF re validation Then we have AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The main flow is RA VF AE optional repeating RMI then VF AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The event log shows that after AE we might have one or more RMI events and then a VF event But in case 2 after AE we have AD immediately So the segment after AE is either RMI one or more times then VF or nothing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we can model the part after AE as XOR tau and sequence of RMI repetition then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The repetition of RMI can be modeled with the loop operator by using loop RMI tau This gives one or more RMI events with silent repetitions between iterations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me validate with the traces Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC matches Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC matches by choosing tau Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC matches by repeating the loop once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore the process is a sequence RA then VF then AE then either tau or sequence of loop RMI tau then VF then AD then SC then AC
